The Protégé (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $7,446,823Details
International Box Office $809,206
Worldwide Box Office $8,256,029
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,787,814
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,684,375
Total $3,472,189
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Rescued as a child by the legendary assassin Moody and trained in the family business, Anna is the world’s most skilled contract killer. But when Moody — the man who was like a father to her and taught her everything she needs to know about trust and survival — is brutally killed, Anna vows revenge. As she becomes entangled with an enigmatic killer whose attraction to her goes way beyond cat and mouse, their confrontation turns deadly and the loose ends of a life spent killing will weave themselves ever tighter.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$2,908,221 (39.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.56 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:90.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,577 opening theaters/2,577 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $8,757,519

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 20th, 2021 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: August 19th, 2021 (Wide), released as Кодекс киллера (Russia (CIS))
August 27th, 2021 (Wide), released as A Protegida (Portugal)
August 27th, 2021 (Wide) (Romania)
September 3rd, 2021 (Wide) (Lithuania)
December 1st, 2021 (Wide), released as 더 프로티제 (South Korea)
Video Release: September 21st, 2021 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong and bloody violence, language, some sexual references and brief nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2685 (cert #53000), 6/16/2021)
Running Time: 109 minutes
Geographical setting: Vietnam
Plot point: Death of a Mentor, Hitmen, Orphan, Revenge
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Millennium Media, Campbell Grobman Films, Seven Stars Entertainment, Lionsgate, Ingenious Media, I Road, Fourteen Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Rescued as a child by the legendary assassin Moody and trained in the family business, Anna is the world’s most skilled contract killer. But when Moody — the man who was like a father to her and taught her everything she needs to know about trust and survival — is brutally killed, Anna vows revenge. As she becomes entangled with an enigmatic killer whose attraction to her goes way beyond cat and mouse, their confrontation turns deadly and the loose ends of a life spent killing will weave themselves ever tighter.
